/usr/bin/ar qc libexchange_core.a CMakeFiles/exchange_core.dir/src/Order.cpp.o CMakeFiles/exchange_core.dir/src/Orderbook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/exchange_core.dir/src/MatchingEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/exchange_core.dir/src/Trade.cpp.o CMakeFiles/exchange_core.dir/src/Logger.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libexchange_core.a
